yogurt-mousse-with-fruit-argiro.name: Yogurt Mousse With Fruit

ingredients.item: 2 tsp honey or sweetener of your liking
2 tsp honey or sweetener of your liking

instructions: Add the yogurt to a bowl and add the honey or other sweetener of our liking.
Mix the ingredients and keep them in the refrigerator.
Add the cold cream to a clean bowl.
With a wire or hand mixer, beat the cream in thick form.
Add the whipped cream into the bowl with the yogurt.
Continue mixing, homogenize the ingredients for yoghurt mousse.
Serve in individual glasses.
Add broken cookies, add some jam, continue with some mousse and garnish with fresh red fruits.
Optionally, add Aegine peanut.
Place them in the refrigerator for two hours to freeze.
In addition to a glass, it can enter a deep bowl and serve with a spoon in individual bowls.

yolk-and-port-wine-pudding-teleculinaria.name: Yolk And Port Wine Pudding
yolk-and-port-wine-pudding-teleculinaria.original_name: Pudim de gemas e vinho do Porto
instructions: Light a pan with 300 g of sugar, 300 ml of water, butter, lemon peel and cinnamon stick. Let it boil for 2 minutes.
On the other hand, beat the yolks with the Port wine until it's a very cute one. Mix carefully the previous syrup and book.
In a thick bottom pot, pour the remaining sugar and water and let the caramel point be obtained. Caramelize a pudding form.
Pour the prepared in the form and put it in the oven, preheated at 180oC, in a sea bath, for 1 hour. Remove and let it cool down before deforming. Serve real cold.
